sql_array: CREATE TABLE regions (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO regions VALUES (1, 'Region A'), (2, 'Region B'), (3, 'Region C'), (4, 'Region D'), (5, 'Region E');
SELECT regionHierarchy(1) AS arr FROM regions;
UPDATE regions SET name = 'Updated Region A' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT regionHierarchy(3) AS arr, arrayMap(id -> regionToName(id, 'en'), arr) FROM regions;
